scope: Conservative claim-framing packet for RC-RefGS using current i300 evidence only.

current_evidence.training_protocol: Matched Ref-GS baseline vs RC-RefGS, held-out split preserved with --eval, 300 iterations, one seed, scenes teapot/toaster/car.

reflection_consistency.summary: RC lowers measured reprojected reflection-consistency error on all three scenes and both train/test splits.
reflection_consistency.caveat: Metric is pair-sampling dependent and uses max_pairs=10 with max_angle_deg=180.

standard_rendering.summary: Full-image and reflective-mask PSNR/SSIM improve on teapot, but PSNR is slightly lower on toaster and car and SSIM is mixed.
standard_rendering.caveat: LPIPS was skipped; do not claim overall rendering improvement.

normal_diagnostics.summary: Full-split raw-convention normal diagnostics improve normal MAE and cosine on all six scene/split rows.
normal_diagnostics.caveat: Deltas are small and this is not mesh/reference-geometry evidence.

geometry.summary: Current RefNeRF i300 outputs have no extracted meshes; RefNeRF points3d.ply is random initialization data; SMVP3D has OBJ references but requires loader/runtime prerequisites.
geometry.caveat: No geometry-quality or surface-reconstruction claim is supported.

allowed_wording: RC-RefGS adds a gated cross-view reflection-consistency objective to Ref-GS while preserving the base representation and renderer.

In short i300 sanity runs on teapot, toaster, and car, RC-RefGS consistently lowers the measured reprojected reflection-consistency error relative to matched Ref-GS baselines on both train and held-out test splits.
The result supports the intended optimization target: reducing a view-pair reflection-consistency diagnostic.
Full-split normal-map diagnostics are directionally favorable but small, and should be reported as diagnostics rather than geometry evidence.
qualified_wording: Rendering quality remains mixed under the current evidence: PSNR/SSIM gains are scene-dependent and LPIPS is unavailable.
The current evidence is short-run only: 300 iterations, one seed, three scenes, and sampled reflection pairs.
The normal diagnostic trend is favorable, but the effect size is small and no mesh/reference metric has been run.
Geometry claims are gated on mesh extraction and reference-geometry evaluation, preferably on SMVP3D after loader/runtime prerequisites are fixed.
forbidden_wording: Do not claim improved overall novel-view synthesis quality.
Do not claim improved mesh quality, surface reconstruction, or geometry quality.
Do not claim material decomposition improvement.
Do not claim superiority over external methods or paper baselines.
Do not use RefNeRF points3d.ply as ground-truth geometry.

reflection_claim: Report scene, split, max_pairs, max_angle_deg, and pair count.
Keep claim scoped to measured reflection-consistency error under the i300 sanity protocol.
rendering_claim: Run LPIPS with cached or approved weights.
Require non-negative or explicitly explained PSNR/SSIM/LPIPS trends across scenes before any overall rendering claim.
Repeat at longer training horizons and preferably more than one seed.
geometry_claim: Do not evaluate RefNeRF random points3d.ply as ground truth.
Add SMVP3D loader or transform conversion.
Run Chamfer/F-score or equivalent mesh/reference metrics against OBJ references.
causality_claim: Run ablations for w/o L_ref, w/o specular confidence, and roughness-only regularization.
Avoid attributing all observed changes to RC before ablations are available.

decision.model_recommendation: SWITCH MODEL to gpt-5.5 for paper language and acceptance-threshold drafting.
